name: File and Directory Permission Modification (Windows)
notes:
This rule detects file and directory permission modification in Windows.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Jakob Weinzettl, oscd.community, Nasreddine Bencherchali
SIGMA Title: File or Folder Permissions Modifications
SIGMA Description: Detects a file or folder's permissions being modified or tampered with.


Confidence: LOW

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

when the event matches (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cacls.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%icacls.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%net.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%net1.exe') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/grant everyone:f /t /c /q' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/setowner%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/inheritance:r%')) OR (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%attrib.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-r%') OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%takeown.exe') AQL filter query

when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ICACLS C:\ProgramData\dynatrace\gateway\config\connectivity.history /reset' OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ICACLS C:\ProgramData\dynatrace\gateway\config\config.properties /grant :r %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%S-1-5-19:F%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code%' OR "Parent Process File Path" LIKE '%\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe')) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY File and Directory Permission Modification (Windows) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Command Execution Success

AND when the event matches (((LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%cacls.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%icacls.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%net.exe' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%net1.exe') AND (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/grant everyone:f /t /c /q' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/setowner%' OR LOWER("Command") LIKE '%/inheritance:r%')) OR (LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%attrib.exe' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%-r%') OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE '%takeown.exe') AQL filter query

AND NOT when the event matches (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ICACLS C:\ProgramData\dynatrace\gateway\config\connectivity.history /reset' OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%ICACLS C:\ProgramData\dynatrace\gateway\config\config.properties /grant :r %' AND LOWER("Command") LIKE '%S-1-5-19:F%') OR (LOWER("Command") LIKE '%\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code%' OR "Parent Process File Path" LIKE '%\Microsoft VS Code\Code.exe')) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: File and Directory Permission Modification (Windows)
Event description: Detects file and directory permission modification in Windows.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
